intent: Attachment display and upload for AI conversations. Includes message attachment previews, input attachment list, and add-attachment button.

blacklist.description: Do not override attachment container radius and border
Do not override attachment thumbnail size
Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(muted|card|background)

aiPrompt: Use Attachment from @/components/base. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
